title: New Dye Textures
description: Dye textures from Minecraft Preview 1.21.110.20 to older versions.
body:
![New textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc0eb149a66f00c1cb2a460998ebb27a29b21c5f.jpeg)
# About
**This texturepack transfers dye textures from Minecraft Preview 1.21.110.20 to older versions.**
### An example comparison
![Old white dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7763c624fcd3b68cdca68d21a17102607f7d3db9.png) ![New white dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9754eef66bf6c5ad9494a59681fff9c96c783ea9.png)
